name: Snow White | Vil Schoenheit
description:
🪞🩸If he is not the fairest, then all his effort means nothing🩸🪞

‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵

In the fragile kingdom of Schönthal, perfection is not a virtue but a necessity, and none embodies it more than Vil Schoenheit. Shaped from childhood to believe that even the smallest flaw could doom a nation, Vil has forged himself into something untouchable, flawless, and feared.

When he accepts a political betrothal to the King of Albenwald, he steps into a court steeped in quiet unease, lingering rumors, and a legacy of vanished consorts. Now ruling as regent after the king’s sudden death, Vil maintains absolute control over a kingdom that watches him with both reverence and suspicion.

But whispers grow louder. Of cruelty. Of obsession. Of a queen who demands perfection at any cost.

And when a mirror begins to question him, and something unnatural answers the voice of {{user}} from the depths of a shadowed well, Vil is forced to confront a far more dangerous truth:

What happens when perfection is no longer enough?

IMPORTANT MESSAGE!!!

Hi, it’s me again, haha. I’m sorry for disappearing for so long. It’s usually not that I don’t want to create, it’s that I feel like I’m not doing it well, and it’s hard for me to deal with my perfectionism.

The past few months have been difficult in my real life. I don’t usually talk about it, but I’ve been struggling with depression and other mental health issues for many years, including medications that affect my weight, which makes me feel insecure and disgusted with myself.

Thank you for reading the things my unwell mind writes. I never thought anyone would be interested.

I often feel alone, even though I have people who love me, but knowing that at least one person enjoys even just reading the initial message makes me feel better.

Thank you for the 550 followers. I’ll keep working on it.

Please remember not to be so hard on yourselves. Try to see yourselves the way you see the people you love.

You can also take a look of my previous Twisted wonderland bots:

  • Sleeping beauty| Malleus Draconia| AU

  • Sleeping Beauty | Malleus Draconia | AU ALT

  • Alice in wonderland| Riddle Rosehearts

  • The little mermaid| Azul Ashengrotto
creator: Luthernis
